regime_fall.current_status: US-Israeli forces have conducted over 8,000 combined strikes through late March 2026, including destruction of nuclear facilities at Natanz and four ballistic missile production facilities on March 29, while Iranian missile stocks are depleted and military leadership has been reshuffled toward security-dominated structures amid succession uncertainty. Nationwide internet blackouts persist as Strait of Hormuz disruptions create global economic fallout, while Iran continues ballistic missile launches against regional targets despite diminished capacity.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Combined US-Israeli forces executed over 8,000 strikes by late March 2026, including strikes on Natanz nuclear facility on March 21 and four ballistic missile production facilities on March 29, severely degrading Iranian military-industrial capacity.
